plugins.name: agent-handoff
plugins.description: Strict 3-stage handoff workflow (plan → execute → verify) for coding agents.

plugins.name: study-coding-mode
plugins.description: Learn-by-typing tutor mode — explains the why, hands you one step at a time to type yourself, verifies it, and teaches the architecture/patterns/terms as a persistent on/off mode. Junior/mid/senior teaching levels.
